title: Telnyx Toll-Free Verification rejection — Vrtl Pirates website complaint
html:
telnyx support ticket rejecting Vrtl Pirates' toll-free SMS verification — site needs Business Name, Contact Info, Products/Services, About, Contact, Privacy/Terms pages, plus standard CTIA opt-in disclosures (use case, data rates, frequency, STOP, HELP, privacy). First of four sequential Telnyx rejections that month.

telnyx · vrtl pirates · ctia compliance · toll free verification · outpace
